{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241118529AAA285FF99C5DFA48C6"}"},"total":12881},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7117860027616576267","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，剧情条理，母子的互动真的很温馨，主角还一点也不圣母让人看了整体很舒适，解气，自在的感觉，哈哈，感觉已经完全不需要什么男主了，都是渣男，希望作者可以让主角后续可以狠狠的教训那两个渣男，有男主也希望不是他们中的任何一个了。加油哦！作者大大，期待更新！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657256012,"group_id":"7106883429395860491","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"偏爱爽文，智商在线，条理清晰文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzC5qbIaFgC5GXlGOvQ5puI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"672554513088232","user_name":"爱吃香辣小鱼酱的元灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"672554513088232","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710822183,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7106883429395860491","book_info":{"abstract":"王玘车祸去世后，穿到了一本霸道总裁爱上我的言情小说里，意外成为男主的继母，三个反派大佬的亲妈。
可王玘穿越的时间是九十年代，小说剧情开始的五年前，此时原小说女主还未重生，剧情还未开始。反派大佬之一的大儿子才十四岁，另外两个更是在自己的肚子中还未出生。
为了扭转自己炮灰的命运和三个孩子悲惨的结局，王玘利用自己穿书得来的金手指，赌石鉴宝积累财富；招兵买马开公司、买地皮成为亿万富翁！
她要把疯批偏执的黑帮大佬长子培养成五好爱国青年；把阴郁寡言的高智商反社会天才女儿教育成科研大佬；让纨绔躁郁症的惹事小儿子成为国际巨星。
努力让大家和原剧情说拜拜！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/be68aae65a83a9e4e9f24e9ce542b5b1","author":"子虚乌有君","author_id":"","book_id":"7106883429395860491","book_name":"穿成男主小妈后，带反派幼崽跑路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":79,"name":"年代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=79&name=年代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7106883713648361997","read_count":"30817","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1210980"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"550","tags":"年代,现代言情,种田,萌宝,总裁,穿越,穿书,发家致富,魂穿,养崽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7ed165133ee06f5ed5430065d959af5e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506332&x-signature=rqLjmeVdDGWZrY37uAciNgaA9wQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3976310814679246","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.3202693e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241118529AAA285FF99C5DFA48C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13202,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":71065},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7131239020176245541","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"姐妹们如果有想看女主自尊自强，不想成为男人的附庸品的，也不想看傻白甜的，强烈推荐这本书！这本书我看了好久了。这个题材很古早，但是里面的内容一点也不玛丽苏。相对于其他文章着重男女情感爱情纠纷啊。这本书我觉得更写的是女主独立自强，自尊自爱。女主她不做作也不特别的狂。相比于一开始男主和女主就是双强的那种，我更喜欢去看那种养成系的感觉。女主就是一步步走向巅峰。而且这篇文章女主的事业线。并不是特别的专业术语，但是也没有那些胡诌的发财梦。又很平常的话，让你在女主一步步的进步过程中。如果感觉到女主在逐渐变强。而且女主非常的谦虚和低调，也很冷静。这本书虽然顶着狗血的题目。但是拿着不狗血的剧本。强烈推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660371061,"group_id":"7106883429395860491","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这一次让我成为自已人生的大女主吧！！(｡>∀<｡)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NznGVq6UiBFe/w+QPTLBbns=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/abc483d30fba4836bb84ae78ec99b955~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877366&x-signature=s%2FrYzxvdt6zOJQ%2FLMg2KBurAg3E%3D","user_id":"818468838966475","user_name":"史里淘金的淘金娘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"818468838966475","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_i 可王玘穿越的时间是九十年代，小说剧情开始的五年前，此时原小说女主还未重生，剧情还未开始。反派大佬之一的大儿子才十四岁，另外两个更是在自己的肚子中还未出生。
为了扭转自己炮灰的命运和三个孩子悲惨的结局，王玘利用自己穿书得来的金手指，赌石鉴宝积累财富；招兵买马开公司、买地皮成为亿万富翁！
